record.field: domain = model._domain_for_pos_manager_user() action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.act_window', 'name': 'My POS orders', 'res_model': 'pos.order', 'view_mode': 'list,form', 'domain': domain, 'context': {'search_default_group_by_config_cluster': 1}, }
action = model.action_open_pos_hierarchy_window( name='Abu Dhabi — regional', domain=model._config_domain_for_region_team('auh'), group_by_cluster=True, )
action = model.action_open_pos_hierarchy_window( name='Northern UAE — regional', domain=model._config_domain_for_region_team('shj'), group_by_cluster=True, )
action = model.action_open_pos_hierarchy_window( name='Cluster Manager DXB 1', domain=model._config_domain_for_cluster_name('Cluster Manager DXB 1'), )
action = model.action_open_pos_hierarchy_window( name='Cluster Manager DXB 2', domain=model._config_domain_for_cluster_name('Cluster Manager DXB 2'), )
action = model.action_open_pos_hierarchy_window( name='Cluster Manager DXB 3', domain=model._config_domain_for_cluster_name('Cluster Manager DXB 3'), )
action = model.action_open_pos_hierarchy_window( name='Cluster Manager DXB 4', domain=model._config_domain_for_cluster_name('Cluster Manager DXB 4'), )
